  - heading "Fuelled by Ambition, Ignited by Partnership" [ref=e16] [level=1]
  - paragraph: We are fuelled by ambition and defined by an ecosystem of trusted, scaled content, market-leading data, transformative tech and AI – all focused on delivering proven business outcomes for you. Ignited by partnership, we embed brands right at the heart of Australian culture. Weaving your stories into ours is what we do best, creating moments that truly last.
